# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3.11-slim

WORKDIR /app

RUN mkdir -p /app/processed /app/uploads

COPY requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt

RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt || true

COPY process_files.py /app/process_files.py

COPY uploads/ /app/uploads/

VOLUME ["/app/uploads"]

ENV UPLOAD_DIR=/app/uploads
ENV PROCESSED_DIR=/app/processed

RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash processor && \
    chown -R processor:processor /app

USER processor

WORKDIR /app

CMD ["python", "process_files.py"]
